---
format: html
title: interpolate_community_data()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>interpolate_community_data</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Interpolate Community Data</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Interpolates community proportion data to a regular time grid.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>interpolate_community_data(data, ...)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data">data</code></td>
<td>
<p>A data frame with columns 'dataset_name', 'taxon', 'age', and
'pollen_prop'. Must already be in proportion form — see
[make_community_proportions()].</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="...">...</code></td>
<td>
<p>Additional arguments passed to [interpolate_data()], such as
'timestep', 'age_min', and 'age_max'.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>Calls [interpolate_data()] grouped by 'dataset_name' and 'taxon'.
Data must be converted to proportions before calling this function
using [make_community_proportions()].
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A data frame with interpolated community data at regular time
intervals.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[make_community_proportions()], [interpolate_data()]
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
